entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in Xince and Xodel successful, version 1.0. - xodel
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform

[xule:error] rule add_facts_to_instance: Rule: add_facts_to_instance - Property 'name' is not a property of a 'int'. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1162461/000162828024022628/cutr-20231231.htm
